title: Santa Placemats in 4 Different Designs
description: Check out these festive, Macneil Studio Santa Placemats in 4 Different Designs from Lesser and Pavey to get you in the Christmas Spirit. These placemats all feature a very jolly Santa Claus and are perfect for protecting your table from spills and scratches, while also adding a rustic and stylish touch to your dining experience this Christmas. Perfect for using at Christmas time with the whole family.
